nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 坎拉翁火山
nodes.summary: 坎拉翁火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Negros scops owl、Pinsker's hawk-eagle、白翅鹃鵙等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Central Cebu Protected Landscape
nodes.summary: Central Cebu Protected Landscape是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白臀啸鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 白臀啸鹟
nodes.summary: 白臀啸鹟（White-vented whistler，学名 Pachycephala homeyeri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: Northern Negros Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Negros Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Luzon boobook、Negros scops owl、Blue-crowned racket-tail等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Central Cebu Protected Landscape, Mount Kanlaon and Northern Negros Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Central Cebu Protected Landscape, Mount Kanlaon and Northern Negros Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Central Cebu Protected Landscape, Mount Kanlaon and Northern Negros Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, its habitat in the Philippines continues to be deforested throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
